chunks.text: H I G H C O U R T O F S I N D H A T K A R A C H I IInd Appeal No.186 of 2020 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: State Bank of Pakistan, through Mr. Manzoor ul Haq, Advocate Respondent No.1: Amjad Meraj s/o Azamat Khan Respondent No.2: Azmat Khan s/o pf Taj Khan Respondent No.3: Nawab Khan s/o Taj Khan Through Mr. Javed Haleem Advocate Date of hearing: 17.09.2025 and 22.09.2025 Date of Order: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to follow, the above- titled IInd appeal is allowed, and the impugned Appellate Judgment dated 24.08.2020 and Decree dated 02.09.2020 passed by the IIIrd Addl. District Judge Karachi (South) in Civil Appeal No.196/2017 is set aside. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
